data.title: Larry Summers: National Bitcoin Reserve 'Crazy'
data.description: Former Treasury Secretary Larry Summers has dismissed the idea of a national Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reserve as “crazy” amidst ongoing deliberations in Congress
